headline: Jim Cramer on United Parcel: “I Don’t Buy Stocks for Yield. I Buy Stocks for Growth”
summary: United Parcel Service, Inc. (NYSE:UPS) was among Jim Cramer’s stock calls on Mad Money as he discussed how semiconductor and AI infrastructure stocks are driving the market higher. Inquiring about the stock, a caller noted its 20% year-to-date decline and called the company’s Q1 earnings per share “not pretty.” Cramer replied: I don’t, you know, […]
